channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Palace urges Sara Duterte to address allies amid calls to halt political maneuvering
item.description: The Philippine Palace has responded to Sara Duterte's recent call for an end to political posturing, suggesting she should first direct her message to her own allies. The statement comes as part of on...

item.title: Pioneer Wally Funk, oldest woman to travel into space, dies at 87
item.description: Wally Funk, an aviation pioneer who became the oldest woman to travel into space, has died at the age of 87. She was one of 13 female pilots who underwent the same rigorous tests as NASA’s all-male as...

item.title: Star-Studded Racing Drama Films in the Isle of Man
item.description: The film 'Isle of Man' is set to shoot in north Sligo, Ireland, featuring Channing Tatum, Eve Hewson, and Ciarán Hinds. Backed by Brad Pitt’s Plan B Entertainment, the racing drama centers on the Isle...

item.title: Typhoon Inday Leaves Over 500 People Stranded in Philippine Ports
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) reported that over 500 people were stranded in various ports across the country on July 10, 2026, due to the severe weather conditions caused by Typhoon Inday. The inc...

item.title: Investing in Renewable Energy Drives Global Business Growth and Sustainability
item.description: Investing in renewable energy is crucial for global business growth due to environmental, economic, and technological factors. Climate change remains the primary driver, as fossil fuels contribute sig...

item.title: Canadians Express Frustration Over Stereotypical Portrayals in U.S. TV Shows
item.description: A recent survey by the Writers Guild of Canada reveals widespread Canadian dissatisfaction with how they are portrayed on U.S. television shows. Over 70% of respondents expressed frustration with clic...

item.title: Kenyan Politicians Prepare for 2027 Presidential Race with Rallies and University Admission Challenges
item.description: The article highlights key developments in Kenya's political and educational landscape. Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna, leader of the Linda Mwananchi movement, is set to launch his presidential bid in 2...

item.title: Government and Field Marshal Munir Address Population Growth Challenges
item.description: The federal government has shifted focus to Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir to address Pakistan's rapid population growth, which is expected to make the country the fourth most populous by 2030. Federal...

item.title: Three Dead in Rohini Building Collapse; Rescue Operations Continue
item.description: A four-storey under-construction building collapsed in north-west Delhi's Rohini Sector 16, resulting in three fatalities. The deceased include Ram Dua (62), husband of building owner Manju Dua; Kafe ...

item.title: Lessons for African Nations from America's 250 Years of Great Power Politics
item.description: The article explores key lessons African nations can draw from America's 250-year history of great power politics to strengthen sovereignty, security, and economic resilience. It emphasizes that sover...

item.title: UK Heatwave Continues with 35C Temperatures and Potential Record-Breaking Durations
item.description: The UK is experiencing a prolonged heatwave with temperatures reaching 35C, expected to persist until the end of next week. This marks the third heatwave of the year, with eight consecutive days excee...

item.title: Literary Analysis: Themes of Power, Resilience, and Conflict in African Narratives
item.description: The article delves into four distinct literary works that tackle pressing social issues through their narratives. 'A Man of Awesome Power' critiques political corruption and the moral decay of authori...

item.title: FIFA Faces Credibility Crisis Over Officiating and VAR Decisions in 2026 World Cup
item.description: The article discusses growing concerns about FIFA's credibility amid controversies surrounding officiating standards and VAR decisions at the 2026 World Cup. While debates about Lionel Messi's potenti...

item.title: Florida Man Arrested in 1987 Cold Case Murder After Contacting Authorities
item.description: A 70-year-old Florida man, Gary Edward Glowacz, was arrested and charged with murder in the 1987 killing of 20-year-old Melissa Ellison after contacting authorities with information about the cold cas...

item.title: Delhi's global liveability ranking and key factors analyzed
item.description: The article highlights Delhi's position at 120th among 173 cities globally in the Liveability Index, a metric assessing factors like healthcare, education, infrastructure, and safety. It emphasizes ch...

item.title: WhatsApp, Telegram Address MeitY Concerns on Username-Related Impersonation Risks
item.description: The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) has received responses from WhatsApp and Telegram regarding concerns over their username features potentially increasing risks of imperso...

item.title: Time capsule discovered during demolition of former Sault hospital
item.description: During the demolition of a former hospital in Sault, workers uncovered a time capsule dating back to 1963. The discovery, made during the site's redevelopment, included items such as photographs, medi...

item.title: Scottish Climate Activists Oppose New Nuclear Power Plans, Advocate Renewables
item.description: Climate activists in Scotland have strongly criticized the UK government's proposal to establish new nuclear power stations in the country. A report commissioned by Energy Secretary Ed Miliband identi...

item.title: Tanzania Tourism Minister Directs Tanapa Boss to Enhance Discipline and Combat Corruption
item.description: National Resources and Tourism Minister Dr Ashatu Kijaji has directed Tanzania National Parks (Tanapa) Conservation Commissioner Mr Massana Mwishawa to enforce strict discipline among conservation off...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rates for July 10th, 2026
item.description: The article provides details about the current dollar-to-naira exchange rate in Nigeria's black market (parallel market) as of July 10th, 2026. According to sources at Bureau De Change (BDC), traders ...
